user_query: I'm planning a family vacation and we want to visit some famous landmarks. Can you suggest webcams near iconic tourist attractions around the world? Additionally, provide me with the geocoordinates for the address '46.04643887621965, -73.4532516514038'.

TaskList.description: Fetch a list of iconic tourist attractions around the world.
Find available webcams near each of the tourist attractions retrieved in step 1.
Provide geocoordinates for the specified address '46.04643887621965, -73.4532516514038'.
